nasb.text: And the Lord will be king over all the earth; in that day the Lord will be the only one, and His name the only one.

esv.text: And the Lord will be king over all the earth. On that day the Lord will be one and his name one.

cnv.text: 耶和華必作全地的王；到那日，人人都承認耶和華是獨一無二的，他的名也是獨一無二的。

ccb.text: 耶和华必做普世的王。到那天，必唯祂独尊，唯祂的名独尊。
